rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually close to the citing paper’s stated prior-work base: both concern consumer decisions where affect/pleasure can conflict with more “rational” considerations, and the cited study tests rule-based mechanisms plus personality moderation (conscientiousness). Given the citing note explicitly says it extends reason-versus-feelings research from situational effects to stable individual differences, this citation is plausibly a mechanism/theory source rather than an obviously incidental mention.
